final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system in classic minimalist tech style, covering web dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls, intended for product design documentation and developer handoff.

Style/medium: clean systematic UI design language with the geometric precision of Dieter Rams and the restrained warmth of Naoto Fukasawa, designed for scalable product ecosystems
Composition: modular component library layout — dashboard template at top, mobile screen variants in middle row, card/button/control specimens in grid below, generous whitespace between specimens
Subject: 
  - Web dashboard: navigation rail, data visualization widgets, KPI cards, content area
  - Mobile screens: home, detail, settings, with consistent navigation patterns
  - Card specimens: stat cards, media cards, action cards with hierarchy variations
  - Button specimens: primary/secondary/tertiary states, icon buttons, floating action
  - Control specimens: toggles, sliders, input fields, dropdowns, checkboxes, radio buttons
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray canvas with subtle grid system visible, components floating with soft elevation shadows
Lighting/mood: the calm clarity of a well-organized workspace, information hierarchy speaking softly
Color palette: neutral graphite base with one electric accent (cyan or electric blue), high contrast for accessibility, dark mode variant included
Materials/textures: matte surface finishes, subtle depth through layered elevation, no glossy chrome or glass effects
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all components must show default, hover, active, and disabled states; consistent 8px grid system; WCAG AA contrast compliance
Avoid: decorative gradients, skeuomorphic textures, excessive glow effects, 3D chrome renders, "cyberpunk" neon overload
